title: Make Add Comment button interactive with activity timeline integration

requirements.text: When the user clicks the 'Add Comment' button in ActivitySection, add the comment to the activity timeline section that displays below it, showing the new comment immediately in the timeline

quotes: when the user clicks add comment, the comment gets added in the activity timeline section

acceptanceCriteria: Clicking 'Add Comment' submits the comment to the backend
The new comment appears in the activity timeline below the Add Comment button
The comment textarea clears after successful submission
The timeline updates without requiring a page refresh

requirements.text: When the user clicks the history icon, populate the activity timeline field that currently displays 'no activity yet' below the Add Comment button with the case's comment history

quotes: when you click the history icon, populate the field that currently pops up and says 'no activity yet' below the add comment button

acceptanceCriteria: History icon click loads and displays all comments for the current case
The 'no activity yet' message is replaced with actual comment history when available
Comments are fetched from the backend activities data

requirements.text: Display each comment in the comment history enclosed in light color-coded blocks to allow collectors to quickly scan previous comments, with vertical scrolling support and a maximum of 3 comments visible in a single view

quotes: enclose each comment in the comment history in a light color-coded blocks to allow collectors to quickly scan previous comments that allows vertical scrolling and displays a maximum of 3 comments in a single view

acceptanceCriteria: Each comment is displayed in a light-colored background block with sufficient contrast
Comments use distinct but subtle color coding for visual differentiation
The comment container scrolls vertically when there are more than 3 comments
Exactly 3 comments are visible at once without scrolling
The scroll behavior is smooth and intuitive

requirements.text: Write visual coding specifications in the specs section documenting the comment history UI implementation including color codes, dimensions, spacing, typography, and scrolling behavior

quotes: write for me the visual coding specifications in the specs section

acceptanceCriteria: Specifications include exact color values for comment blocks
Specifications define container height for 3-comment view
Specifications document padding, margins, and gap spacing between comments
Specifications include typography settings (font size, weight, line height)
Specifications describe scrollbar styling and overflow behavior

constraints: Use the existing ActivitySection.tsx component and its current structure
Maintain the existing backend Activity type and data model
Keep the existing authentication and query invalidation patterns
Do not modify immutable frontend paths including useInternetIdentity hooks
nonGoals: Adding new activity types beyond comments
Adding user avatars or profile pictures to comments
Creating a separate comments API endpoint
